benefits.description: More energy in the gym on retatrutide than off GLPs entirely, compared to tirzepatide which caused fatigue too severe to hit workout goals
Retatrutide described as more effective compound; people in phase 3 trials losing too much weight, some lowering dosages or dropping out
Less GI distress on retatrutide compared to tirzepatide

side_effects.description: On tirzepatide was too tired from fatigue to hit workout goals

protocol_notes: Has run all 3 main GLPs (semaglutide, tirzepatide, retatrutide). Currently on retatrutide 12mg every 6 days. States most people have less sides on retatrutide, particularly higher energy and less GI distress. Notes that muscle/LBM loss is preventable with adequate protein and resistance training regardless of compound.
